name: Consensus Buyer Enablement API
what_it_does: Buyer enablement platform with REST API — enabling presales and sales teams to create interactive video demos, track individual buyer engagement across the buying committee, share demos with stakeholders, collect NPS-style reactions, and integrate engagement data with CRM for deal intelligence.
use_cases: Querying buyer engagement data for deals — who watched what and for how long
Sharing personalized video demo collections with multiple buying committee members
Integrating Consensus engagement signals with Salesforce for deal health scoring
Pulling demo completion rates and reaction data for presales efficiency analytics
Automating demo delivery based on CRM opportunity stage changes via API
not_for: Marketing-facing demos on websites (use Arcade or Navattic for website demos)
Live interactive product demos (use Zoom + screen share for live demos)
Simple screen recording without buying committee engagement tracking (use Loom)
best_when: A presales or enterprise sales team needs to engage multiple buying committee stakeholders asynchronously with personalized video demos and track individual-level engagement for multi-threaded deals.
avoid_when: You have simple single-stakeholder deals, need interactive click-through demos rather than video, or sell to SMB without complex buying committees.

auth.notes: API key from Consensus account settings. Bearer token auth. Organization-scoped access. Webhook for demo view, reaction, and stakeholder engagement events. No OAuth2. Salesforce and HubSpot native integrations via separate OAuth flow.

pricing.notes: Utah-based company. Founded 2013. Raised $26M. Presales-focused buyer enablement. DemoBoard feature for organized buying committee demo sharing. Individual-level engagement tracking (who watched, when, how long). NPS-style reactions within demos. Salesforce and HubSpot native apps. Strong in enterprise SaaS presales.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for demos, viewers, engagements, and analytics. Bearer token auth. Good documentation for core use cases. Demo and DemoBoard creation is UI-driven — API for engagement data and CRM sync. Webhook delivers individual engagement events. Buying committee tracking at person level.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Demo reads fully idempotent. Engagement reads idempotent by viewer ID. Analytics reads idempotent by date range. DemoBoard reads idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: Demo creation is UI-driven — API is primarily for engagement data and management
Viewer identity requires email tracking link — anonymous viewers not individually tracked
CRM integration uses separate OAuth flow from API key
Annual contract typical — verify commitment before API integration investment
GDPR consent required for EU viewer tracking — implement before sharing demos with EU contacts

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2 and GDPR compliant. US data residency. Bearer token auth. Individual buyer engagement data is sensitive — implement GDPR consent for EU tracking. Video demos may contain proprietary product information. Annual contract with enterprise security requirements.
